subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-07-22
subcodes.first_line: Some think that is a third motion of the earth which is the cause of the length or shortness of life. This motion, they say, is different from the diurnal and annual motions
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعضی معتقدند که حرکت ثالث کرهٴ ارض سبب طول و قصر عمر است که این حرکت غیر از حرکت شبانه روز و حرکت
